raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/XXXX i was notified that an online XXXX transaction was charged to my stolen credit card, i immediately called them to report the fraud and was told the amount would be removed and not post to my account, i made a police report regarding the stolen credit card and notified ebays fraud dept regarding the incident and was told it was being investigated. A few days later the amount of XXXX was posted to my account and am being forced to pay until investigation is completed, which is unfair and should be removed and reimbursed as i was forced to pay it so it wont affect my credit. Contacted citi over 5 times and was told it could not be credited until investigation was completed now i am down XXXX that i was forced to pay due to lack of ability on their end to postpone the fraudulent charge
